description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with elongated limbs and a stylized, angular body structure. The figure has long, thin arms and legs, with the arms slightly bent and the hands appearing small and simplified. The torso is sharply faceted, giving a geometric, almost abstract appearance, while the head is small and minimally detailed. The figure is dressed in a fitted top and long pants, with visible shoes on the feet. The overall posture suggests a walking motion, with one leg slightly forward and the arms swinging naturally. The design is minimalist, focusing on exaggerated proportions and clean lines.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with elongated limbs, angular body, and minimalist features, depicted in a walking pose with fitted clothing and visible shoes.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the sharp angles of the torso and the elongated, thin arm extending downward.
description_view_1: This view shows the back and side, revealing the long, straight legs and the simplified hand at the end of the arm.
description_view_2: The front view displays both legs and arms, with the walking posture and the geometric shape of the torso most apparent.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the length of the limbs and the faceted surfaces of the body, with the head and feet visible.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve fitted top and straight-leg pants
